query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION) as cols FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'qumus_core_policies' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
